subject: lithium expansion safety
draft_body: Ricardo, Shell uses FlytBase for autonomous drone inspection. Your 70% lithium production expansion requires reliable 24/7 monitoring. We can help.
company_name: Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile (SQM)
source_signal_used: planned lithium production expansion of over 70%

subject: reducing risk at la negra
draft_body: Luke Kissam, Shell uses FlytBase for autonomous drone inspection. La Negra's 2025 acid leak highlights the need for 24/7 monitoring.
source_signal_used: Albemarle's La Negra processing plant experienced an acid leak due to a pipe rupture in mid-2025

subject: improve site safety at vale
draft_body: Eduardo Bartolomeo, Shell uses FlytBase for autonomous drone inspection. Strengthening dam-safety rules require 24/7 monitoring.
source_signal_used: strengthening of dam-safety and mine-closure requirements
